is arm.description: one is-arm of a when block (m1-lsp completes the whole when/is head, not a standalone arm)

if / else.description: Allman-style if/else (m1-lsp only completes the no-else if)

NaN guard.description: the ECU-legal NaN guard the invalid-value tracer recognises

annotation: requires finite.description: mark the next write as a finite-value sink (typecheck T080)

annotation: allow.description: suppress a diagnostic on the next construct
